specific_question: What professional development did Emily Lee pursue to strengthen her personal analytical capabilities?
answer: In November 2023, Emily Lee completed a professional certification in Advanced Marketing Analytics, enhancing her qualifications for analyzing customer data at Elexion Automotive.
